title: Crunchy Oven-Roasted Algerian Dried Mint Tagine
description: A refreshing Algerian dish featuring dried mint and preserved lemons, perfect for a hangover cure or a light meal. The crunchy texture and bold flavors will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Rinse the dried mint and pat it dry with a paper towel.
In a large bowl, combine the chickpeas, preserved lemons, olive oil, ginger, dashi extract, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well to combine and spread the mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While the chickpea mixture is roasting, combine the lemon juice and water in a small saucepan and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
To assemble the tagine, place a layer of the roasted chickpea mixture on the bottom of a 6-inch round baking dish or ceramic tagine.
Top with a layer of the lemon and water mixture, followed by a layer of breadcrumbs (if using).
Repeat the layering process one more time, ending with a layer of chickpea mixture on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
